K(e)end,{},function(F,i)local K=u(i)local p=function(p,Q)return E(F,{p,Q},i,K)end return p end,function(F,i)local K=u(i)local p=function(p)return E(F,{p},i,K)end return p end,{},function(F,i)local K=u(i)local p=function(...)return E(F,{...},i,K)end return p end return(h(6562291-(-404187),{}))(K(e))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[i(-495373-(-434330))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
